'''jahafa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:placoid|placoid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-h-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:placoid|placoid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| jahafa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæhæfæth|jæhæfæth]] || [[word:jæhæfæj|jæhæfæj]] || [[word:jæhæfæsh|jæhæfæsh]] || [[word:jæhæfæ|jæhæfæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jahahafath|jahahafath]] || [[word:jahahafaj|jahahafaj]] || [[word:jahahafash|jahahafash]] || [[word:jahahafa|jahahafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jahafath|jahafath]] || [[word:jahafaj|jahafaj]] || [[word:jahafash|jahafash]] || [[word:jahafa|jahafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jahaffath|jahaffath]] || [[word:jahaffaj|jahaffaj]] || [[word:jahaffash|jahaffash]] || [[word:jahaffaf|jahaffaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jahafatha|jahafatha]] || [[word:jahafaja|jahafaja]] || [[word:jahafasha|jahafasha]] || [[word:jahafaka|jahafaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jahafath|jahafath]] || [[word:jahafaj|jahafaj]] || [[word:jahafash|jahafash]] || [[word:jahafa|jahafa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jahafathal|jahafathal]] || [[word:jahafajal|jahafajal]] || [[word:jahafashal|jahafashal]] || [[word:jahafakal|jahafakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jahafathatha|jahafathatha]] || [[word:jahafajaja|jahafajaja]] || [[word:jahafashasha|jahafashasha]] || [[word:jahafaka|jahafaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jahafathan|jahafathan]] || [[word:jahafajan|jahafajan]] || [[word:jahafashan|jahafashan]] || [[word:jahafakan|jahafakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jahafathaoro|jahafathaoro]] || [[word:jahafajaoro|jahafajaoro]] || [[word:jahafashaoro|jahafashaoro]] || [[word:jahafakaoro|jahafakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
